title: Mingli29's Modpack
description: The Modpack that Mingli29 uses in the videos, This is also a Modpack for survival
body:
English:\
This is the Modpack that Mingli29 uses in the survival videos, it includes mods like sodium, litematica, replay mod. This Modpack works on Fabric + Fabric API.\
中文:\
这是Mingli29在生存视频中使用的Modpack，它包括像 sodium，litematica, replay mod这样的mod。这个Modpack适用于Fabric + Fabric API
